response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates strong technical breadth with 20+ years of software engineering experience and a solid CS foundation, he does not align with the principal-level strategic focus the role demands. His background is primarily hands-on development (Staff Engineer level) rather than director-level technical leadership or AI strategy. His AI experience is recent (April 2025) and operationally focused on infrastructure, lacking the recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI-powered products, or advanced AI-related degree the job prefers. The role requires strategic partnership and advisory capabilities; this resume reflects individual contributor depth without evidence of strategic innovation leadership.
strengths: Exceeds experience requirement with 20+ years across software, infrastructure, and emerging AI domains, demonstrating sustained technical growth
Entrepreneur with proven ability to architect and build complex systems (GISCollective platform), showing vision beyond execution
Current exposure to cutting-edge AI infrastructure (MCP frameworks, agentic workflows) indicates awareness of modern AI paradigms
concerns: No Master's or PhD in AI/ML despite this being a preferred qualification for a director-level AI strategy role
AI expertise is recent (started April 2025) with no prior track record of recognized AI products, published research, or advisory work in the space

Experience profile is hands-on Staff Engineer level; lacks demonstrated director-level strategic leadership, innovation vision-setting, or customer/partner advisory roles required for this principal-level position

key_factors.factor: Absence of demonstrated AI expertise and products
No advanced degree in AI/ML field
